sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: NXP 2026년 1분기 매출 31억 8,000만 달러로 전년 대비 12% 증가, MEMS 센서 사업 매각 완료

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 매출은 31억 8,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 12% 증가, 자동차 및 산업용 프로세싱 수요 회복을 바탕으로 전 주요 최종시장에 걸친 광범위한 개선이 이루어졌다.
영업현금흐름 7억 9,300만 달러, 순 설비투자 차감 후 잉여현금흐름 7억 1,400만 달러를 창출, 자사주 매입 3억 5,800만 달러 등 주주환원을 지속했다.
MEMS 센서 사업 매각으로 현금 8억 7,800만 달러 수령, 매각 차익 6억 2,700만 달러를 GAAP 기타손익에 반영해 GAAP 영업마진이 일회성으로 크게 확대됐다.

businessChanges.text: S32N7 슈퍼통합 프로세서 시리즈를 공개하고 GE HealthCare와 엣지 AI 협력을 발표하는 등 소프트웨어 정의 차량(SDV)과 물리적 AI 인프라 분야 포지셔닝을 강화했다.
NVIDIA와의 로보틱스 솔루션 협력을 발표하고 eIQ Agentic AI Framework를 출시하며 실시간 엣지 AI 리더십을 확장했다.
MEMS 센서 사업 매각을 통해 비핵심 자산 정리를 완료, 자동차·산업 프로세싱 핵심 역량 집중 전략의 실행력을 확인했다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 31억 8,000만 달러(+12%), Non-GAAP 총이익률 57.1%, Non-GAAP 영업이익률 33.1%.
GAAP 희석 주당순이익 4.43달러(MEMS 매각 일회성 이익 포함), Non-GAAP 기준으로는 이를 제외한 수치 기준 수익성을 확인할 수 있다.
영업현금흐름 7억 9,300만 달러, 잉여현금흐름 7억 1,400만 달러, 분기 내 자사주 매입 3억 5,800만 달러와 배당 1억 200만 달러 지급.
MEMS 센서 사업 매각 현금수령액 8억 7,800만 달러, 매각 차익 6억 2,700만 달러를 GAAP 실적에 반영.

watchItems.text: CEO Rafael Sotomayor가 언급한 '2026년 하반기 성장 가속' 전망과 실제 분기별 매출 궤적을 비교해 SDV 및 산업 AI 수요 모멘텀의 지속성을 점검해야 한다.
MEMS 매각 이후 GAAP과 Non-GAAP 이익 간 괴리가 좁혀지는 속도와, 비핵심 사업 매각으로 확보된 현금의 재투자 방향(M&A·자사주 매입 등)을 주시해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 nxp1q26exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document NXP Semiconductors Reports First Quarter 2026 Results EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, April 28, 2026 – NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) today reported financial results for the first quarter, which ended March 29, 2026. “NXP delivered quarterly revenue of $3.18 billion, up 12% year over year, with broad-based improvement across all of our focus end markets, led by our company-specific growth drivers. Our growth reflects sustained investment, disciplined execution, and growing customer adoption of our differentiated portfolio, particularly in industrial and automotive processing that supports software-defined vehicles and physical AI. The momentum we have built is expected to accelerate through the remainder of 2026, with progress increasingly extending across the core of our business. We remain committed to disciplined investment, margin  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.18 billion = 31억 8,000만 달러; $3.18 = 3.18달러.

expansion, and portfolio optimization to deliver sustainable, long-term value for our shareholders,” said Rafael Sotomayor, NXP President and Chief Executive Officer. Key Highlights for the First Quarter 2026: • Revenue was $3.18 billion, up 12 percent year-on-year; • GAAP gross margin was 56.2 percent, GAAP operating margin was 47.3 percent and GAAP diluted Net Income per Share was $4.43; • Non-GAAP gross margin was 57.1 percent, non-GAAP operating margin was 33.1 percent, and non-GAAP diluted Net Income per Share was $3.05; • Cash flow from operations was $793 million, with net capex investments  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.18 billion = 31억 8,000만 달러; $793 million = 7억 9,300만 달러; $79 million = 7,900만 달러; $714 million = 7억 1,400만 달러; $358 million = 3억 5,800만 달러; $102 million = 1억 200만 달러; $3.18 = 3.18달러; $4.43 = 4.43달러; $793 = 793달러; 12 percent = 12%; 22.4 percent = 22.4%; 56.2 percent = 56.2%; 47.3 percent = 47.3%; 57.1 percent = 57.1%; 33.1 percent = 33.1%; 50.1 percent = 50.1%.

$256 million. After the end of the first quarter, between March 30, 2026, and April 24, 2026, NXP executed via a 10b5-1 program additional share repurchases totaling $32 million; • On January 5, 2026, NXP repaid the $500 million aggregate principal amount of outstanding 5.35% senior unsecured notes due March 1, 2026, at par using available cash; • On January 5, 2026, NXP unveiled the S32N7 super-integration processor series to enable a new era where carmakers can digitalize the core functions of every vehicle; • On January 6, 2026, NXP and GE HealthCare announced a collaboration to pioneer new advancements in edge AI innovation leveraging NXP’s long history in secure, high-performance edge processing; • On January 6, 2026 NXP announced its new eIQ Agentic AI Framework, advancing its leadership in secure, real-time edge AI; • On February 2,  Normalized numeric aliases: $256 million = 2억 5,600만 달러; $32 million = 3,200만 달러; $500 million = 5억 달러; $256 = 256달러; $32 = 32달러; $500 = 500달러.

of our MEMS Sensors business, resulting in cash proceeds of $878 million at closing. This resulted in a one-time gain on the sale of $627 million recorded in Other income (expense) and providing a positive benefit to GAAP operating margin; • On March 9, 2026, NXP announced the i.MX 93W applications processor, expanding NXP’s i.MX 93 family; and • On March 16, 2026, NXP announced innovative robotics solutions developed in collaboration with NVIDIA for reliable, secure, real-time data processing and transport and advanced networking, enabling sensor fusion. 1 Summary of  Normalized numeric aliases: $878 million = 8억 7,800만 달러; $627 million = 6억 2,700만 달러; $878 = 878달러; $627 = 627달러; $3,181 = 3,181달러; $3,335 = 3,335달러; $2,835 = 2,835달러; $1,788 = 1,788달러; $1,560 = 1,560달러; 3,335 million = 33억 3,500만 달러; 1,815 million = 18억 1,500만 달러; 1,788 million = 17억 8,800만 달러; 1,807 million = 18억 700만 달러; 1,560 million = 15억 6,000만 달러; 1,913 million = 19억 1,300만 달러; 1,591 million = 15억 9,100만 달러.
